all.en: Northwind Industries is delighted to announce a new strategic partnership.
all.zh: Northwind 工業很高興宣布一項全新的策略合作。

all.en: Effective immediately, we will partner with Summit Materials as a key supplier.
all.zh: 即日起，我們將與 Summit Materials 結為主要供應商夥伴。

all.en: Summit Materials is a recognized leader in sustainable raw material production.
all.zh: Summit Materials 是永續原料生產領域公認的領導者。

all.en: The agreement covers an initial term of five years with optional extensions.
all.zh: 本協議初始期為五年，並可選擇延長。

all.en: It also includes joint research and development on next-generation components.
all.zh: 協議亦涵蓋次世代零組件的聯合研發。

all.en: Our combined expertise will accelerate innovation across multiple product lines.
all.zh: 雙方結合的專業將加速多條產品線的創新。

all.en: Both companies share a strong commitment to environmental responsibility.
all.zh: 兩家公司皆對環境責任懷有堅定承諾。

all.en: We will work together to reduce carbon emissions throughout the supply chain.
all.zh: 我們將攜手降低整個供應鏈的碳排放。

all.en: Summit will supply recycled metals and bio-based composites starting next quarter.
all.zh: Summit 將自下季起供應回收金屬與生物基複合材料。

all.en: These materials meet or exceed all current industry quality standards.
all.zh: 這些材料符合或超越目前所有產業品質標準。

all.en: Customers will benefit from improved durability and lower environmental impact.
all.zh: 顧客將受惠於更高的耐用度與更低的環境衝擊。

all.en: Our procurement team has conducted extensive audits over the past year.
all.zh: 我們的採購團隊過去一年進行了廣泛的稽核。

all.en: Summit Materials passed every quality and ethical sourcing review.
all.zh: Summit Materials 通過了每一項品質與道德採購審查。

all.en: The partnership is expected to generate substantial cost savings as well.
all.zh: 此次合作預期也將帶來可觀的成本節省。

all.en: Initial estimates suggest a 12 percent reduction in unit production costs.
all.zh: 初步估算顯示單位生產成本可降低百分之十二。

all.en: Our CEO, James Holloway, expressed great enthusiasm about the alliance.
all.zh: 我們的執行長 James Holloway 對此聯盟表達高度熱忱。

all.en: He noted that the partnership aligns perfectly with our growth strategy.
all.zh: 他指出此合作與我們的成長策略完全契合。

all.en: A joint operations office will be established in Chicago by the end of July.
all.zh: 聯合營運辦公室將於七月底前在芝加哥成立。

all.en: Approximately 30 employees from both organizations will be based there.
all.zh: 兩家公司約 30 名員工將進駐該辦公室。

all.en: Quarterly business reviews will track key milestones and shared objectives.
all.zh: 季度業務檢討會將追蹤關鍵里程碑與共同目標。

all.en: Customers and partners are invited to a launch event on June 8.
all.zh: 我們邀請顧客與合作夥伴參加六月八日的啟動活動。

all.en: The event will feature presentations, product demonstrations, and networking.
all.zh: 活動將包含簡報、產品展示及交流時間。

all.en: For media inquiries, please contact our communications department directly.
all.zh: 媒體洽詢請直接聯繫我們的傳訊部門。

all.en: We are confident this partnership will deliver long-term value to all stakeholders.
all.zh: 我們有信心此次合作將為所有利害關係人帶來長期價值。
